model_config_note: thinking+action models and config hash are recorded per-run in each run-pin.json (sanitized_config + prompt_bundle_sha256); this panel does not override them.
image_digest_source: run-pin.json:container_image_digest — verified against the created container by the collector's run-probe path (_container_image_digest).

bigtop.note: compiled_classes floor = floor(0.8 * min(121,121,121)); executed/failed from final7 x3 baseline (50/50). judgment/source predicates fresh-run only (final7 predates the oracle fix).

httpcomponents-client.note: historical 1,856; the 16-test mis-scope must be impossible.

tvm.note: structured python-tool field; never summary text. Evidence source mode pinned tool-emitted for this campaign.

pyyaml.note: executed floor is CALIBRATED (three arm-P calibration runs, excluded from the panel) and appended to the ledger before the panel starts: floor = max(1, floor(0.8 * min(executed over three valid runs))).

baseline_reds.note: Panel precondition (analyzer-diet.md:536-555): the SIX pre-existing SUITE failures registered in the campaign ledger at panel start; any NEW suite failure BLOCKS the panel. These are suite reds, NOT probes.
